title: Necklaces by Timka Jewelry
excerpt: My everyday go-to necklaces are by local designer, Timka Jewelry . I also have the little "J" initial, which I bought while in Denver a year ago ( Instagrammed here ), but I paired by "A" with the labradorite one…
body: My everyday go-to necklaces are by local designer, Timka Jewelry. I also have the little "J" initial, which I bought while in Denver a year ago (Instagrammed here), but I paired by "A" with the labradorite one. It's an amazing, totally natural gemstone said to awaken our magical and mystical power. Woohoo! Obviously I think these necklaces would make a perfect gift for the holidays! Use TANGERINE15 for 15% off your entire order through 12/15 at Timka Jewelry.
